title: nephrodium nemorosum
intro: Nephrodium nemorosum, also known as the wood fern or wood-rue fern, is a type of fern native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are believed to aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium nemorosum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium nemorosum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
